74378.subject: I Spent 20 Hours Testing Fable 5. Here Are The 10 Workflows That Matter🚀
74378.body:
AI Frontier

Автор: Steve Nouri


Автор: Steve Nouri

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/i-spent-20-hours-testing-fable-5-here-10-workflows-matter-steve-nouri-dlnuc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BjV3G6OWBRTGgU3E%2Bg6l5yQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2NY-qI07_R-Ig1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq9n4o1m~h-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq9n4o1m-h
  
Learning 95% of Fable 5 in 10 Minutes Most people will use Fable 5 like a smarter chatbot. That's a mistake. Fable 5 isn't just better at answering questions. It's dramatically better at working autonomously, reasoning across huge amounts of information, analyzing images, building software, and improving its own outputs over long tasks. If you learn these 10 workflows, you'll get more value from Fable 5 than 95% of users. 1. Stop Prompting. Start Briefing. Bad: "Write me a newsletter about AI agents." Good: "Act as an AI industry analyst. Audience: Enterprise leaders. Goal: Explain why most AI agent projects fail. Tone: Practical, data-driven. Include: 3 common mistakes 2 real-world examples 1 action framework Challenge your own assumptions before responding." Fable 5 performs best when given context, constraints, and objectives. Treat it like a smart employee, not a search engine. Turn Microsoft Marketplace into revenue. Microsoft Marketplace helps startups reach millions of customers, close deals faster, and grow globally by putting your solution inside the products they use every day, including Microsoft Azure and Microsoft 365 Copilot. Sell alongside Microsoft and its partner ecosystem to extend your reach and simplify procurement, making it easier for customers to buy. Companies are already seeing the impact. Neo4j made Marketplace a core go-to-market channel and reported 6x revenue growth and up to 40% faster sales cycles. Ready to get started? Watch the AI Envisioning Day video series to learn how to build, publish, and sell through Marketplace. 2. Force It To Ask Questions Before starting any important task, use: "Ask me questions until you are 95% confident you can complete this task exceptionally well." This single prompt dramatically improves output quality. Most people spend 20 minutes fixing a bad answer. Power users spend 2 minutes improving the brief. 3. Use Projects For Persistent Intelligence Create separate projects for: Marketing Sales Product Research Personal assistant Upload: PDFs SOPs Brand guidelines Meeting notes Customer interviews Now Fable 5 works with your context instead of generic internet knowledge. This is where the biggest productivity gains happen. Google didn't update Search at I/O 2026. It replaced it. AI Mode is live, and search agents now answer for users before anyone reaches your page. If yo

74373.subject: Superluminal's Long Runway
74373.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

GM, and happy Thursday! 

Risk assets remain under pressure as equities extend their correction and BTC sits at range lows. ETFs continue to bleed AUM.

Meanwhile, Fogo's flagship perps DEX still hasn't launched. Seven months in, how long can the chain wait for its own thesis to arrive?

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Risk assets are red across the board as equities continue to correct. The S&P 500 is now close to 5% off its highs after 4 consecutive days of trading lower, erasing the gains of the past 25 days. The VIX moved higher with this, closing Wednesday at 22, up from its recent low of 15. Crypto remains weak, with BTC price action staying sideways within the range of last Friday’s sell-off and at range lows. Looking at index returns on the weekly, there’s no safe haven, as all indices register deep declines. The privacy index is the hardest hit, with ZEC down 28% on the week. 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/4f18ee5f-d8db-448e-824e-86c80eaf9fac/image.png?t=1781181756)
Caption: 

With the weakness, ETFs continue to bleed AUM, with the recent week showing continued outflows. 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9456eadb-ae30-48a7-acf0-d4e10b4d40c9/image.png?t=1781181755)
Caption: 

As the bear market persists while BTC teeters on range lows, one must ask where they may find deep value. Historically, every bear on BTC at some stage trades at a discount to the realized price. This measure of the value of all BTC at the price they were last transacted onchain, is akin to an estimate of the average onchain cost basis. Currently, the realized price sits at $53.3k, just 14% below spot. This was always the downside target, it’s just been a long and painful journey to get there. Regardless, high-timeframe indicators of bear market lows are close to firing green, giving the prudent and patient grounds to be optimistic. 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/83ee83a4-c706-482b-9e36-885daaab7038/image.png?t=1781181755)
Caption: 

_— __[Luke](https://x.com/0xMether)_

———————————————————————————

# Superluminal's long runway

Fogo launched its mainnet in November 2025 with its institutional trading thesis resting on two things: a Firedancer-native SVM chain with 40 ms blocks and Ambient Finance as its

74371.subject: Crypto Biz: SpaceX fuels tokenization’s next boom
74371.body:
Crypto Biz Newsletter

Автор: Cointelegraph


Автор: Cointelegraph

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/crypto-biz-spacex-fuels-tokenizations-next-boom-cointelegraph-vgh6c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B36IsO9YxRY2lvjy8S3J7dQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=25JWBt_sOd-Ig1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq9jejsr~fd-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq9jejsr-fd
  
Crypto prices have spent much of the year reacting to macro headlines and regulatory uncertainty, but tokenization has remained one of the industry’s few consistent growth stories. Active real-world assets are surging, banks are embracing blockchain infrastructure and tokenized equities are expanding into new markets. That momentum was on full display this week as Kraken rolled out tokenized access to the highly anticipated SpaceX IPO, offering eligible users in more than 110 markets a chance to participate through xStocks. Elsewhere, prediction markets surpassed onchain gambling for the first time, and former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried formally asked US President Donald Trump for a pardon. Tokenized RWAs keep growing through crypto downturn Tokenized RWAs continue to gain traction despite a weaker crypto market. According to Binance Research, the market for active tokenized RWAs has surged 589% since early 2025, with bonds and money market funds adding $6.5 billion in value while tokenized stocks jumped 422%. The sector is also becoming more diversified. Platforms such as Ondo Global Markets have fueled demand for tokenized equities, while tokenized precious metals gained $1.5 billion as investors sought safe-haven assets earlier this year.  At the same time, traditional financial institutions are expanding their blockchain initiatives, from Apex Group’s tokenized fund services to The Clearing House’s planned tokenized deposit network, highlighting growing adoption beyond crypto-native companies. RWA growth by asset. Source: Binance Research Continue Reading… SpaceX IPO gets tokenized Crypto exchange Kraken gave eligible users in more than 110 markets access to the SpaceX IPO through xStocks, allowing investors to purchase tokenized shares of Elon Musk’s aerospace company ahead of its public debut.  According to Kraken, investors who received an allocation will be issued SPCXx, a tokenized representation backed 1:1 by the underlying equity and tradable 24/7 across participating platforms. The launch comes as demand for tokenized equities continues to accelerate. SpaceX targeted a $75 billion raise in its Nasdaq debut, with the offering reportedly oversubscribed by roughly four times ahead of public trading, putting it on track to become the largest IPO in history. Continue Reading… Prediction markets surpass onchain gambling

74370.subject: Asteria Conference 2026: čo sme predstavili a kam smerujeme
74370.body:
Wexo Cashback, Scan & GO AI, Asteria 2.0 a ďalšie novinky, ktoré zazneli v Modre.

Asteria Conference 2026 ukázala, že sme pripravení na ďalší rast

Ďakujeme všetkým, ktorí boli súčasťou Asteria Conference 2026 v Modre.

Po dlhšej dobe sme sa opäť stretli ako komunita. Nie online. Nie cez správy. Ale osobne, v jednej miestnosti, s energiou, ktorú jednoducho nenahradí žiadny chat, video ani prezentácia.

A presne o tom bola celá konferencia. O tom, že budúcnosť nepatrí tým, ktorí čakajú, ale tým, ktorí ju budujú.

Počas konferencie sme predstavili viacero dôležitých tém, ktoré ukazujú, kam smeruje Asteria a Wexo v roku 2026.

🚀 Wexo Cashback a rast ekosystému

Ukázali sme výsledky, ktoré potvrdzujú, že Wexo nestojí na mieste. Wexo dnes rastie ako cashbackový ekosystém, ktorý spája zákazníkov, lokálnych partnerov, online obchody, nákupné poukážky a budúce SuperApp funkcie do jedného celku. Hovorili sme o tom, že každý nákup má hodnotu. Nie iba pre zákazníka, ale aj pre marketéra, partnera a celú komunitu. Pretože Wexo je postavené na jednoduchej myšlienke:

ľudia budú vždy nakupovať a vždy budú chcieť nakupovať výhodnejšie.

💡 Každý nákup znamená tvoju províziu

Veľkou témou bola matematika Wexo systému.

Cashback, priame odmeny, nepriame odmeny, Wexo Fuel, Founders Club a odmeny z partnerských prevádzok majú spoločný základ: reálne nákupy. Ale každodenná spotreba ľudí, ktorí nakupujú, využívajú výhody a vytvárajú obrat v ekosystéme. To je dôvod, prečo je Wexo pre marketérov tak silná obchodná príležitosť.

🤖 Wexo Partner, Scan&GO AI a nové nástroje pre biznis

Predstavili sme aj nové riešenia pre partnerov, vrátane systému Scan&GO AI. Cieľ je jasný: dať podnikateľom dôvod, prečo sa zákazník má vrátiť. Wexo Partner nie je iba o cashabacku. Je o opakovaných nákupoch, lepšej komunikácii so zákazníkmi, marketingových kampaniach, dátach, komunite a konkurenčnej výhode. Partneri tak získavajú moderný loyalty nástroj novej generácie.

🟣 Asteria 2.0: nový domov pre ďalší rozvoj

Pri Asteria 2.0 sme predstavili nový dashboard, ktorý bude slúžiť ako modernejší a prehľadnejší pracovný nástroj pre klientov aj marketérov. Ukázali sme nový objednávkový proces, automatické generovanie zmlúv a faktúr, prehľadnú dokumentáciu na jednom mieste a nové štatistiky pre lepšie sledovanie aktivity.

Marketéri budú mať v novom systéme jasnejší prehľad o svojej kariére, splnených podmienkach, štruktúre, udalostiach a firemnom kalendári. Súčasťou budú aj nové prvky gamifikácie, odznaky, míľniky a príprava na Wexo Premium Program. Asteria 2.0 preto nie je iba nový dizajn. Je to nový technologický základ, na ktorom bude Asteria ďalej stavať, ktorý má marketérom priniesť viac prehľadu, viac nástrojov a viac možností pri budovaní vlastného biznisu.

🏆 Výsledky majú mená

Súčasťou konferencie bolo aj vyhodnotenie postupov na kariére.

Gratulujeme všetkým, ktorí od posledného obdobia postúpili, pracovali na sebe, budovali tímy a ukázali výsled
